Renderer TypeScript typecheck passed with the added OutboundDraft/OutboundDraftEvent types.

environment.process_note: AGH-020: draft-don't-send reviewed outbox for agent external messages; default parks a draft, block refuses, allow grants explicit audited direct send, operator reviews/edits/approves/denies, and approve-send re-checks the firewall before dispatch.
